'''Salia Arden-Govia''' was the niece of [[Bix Arden-Govia]]. A native of [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]], she lived in its capital city [[Salis D'aar/Legends|Salis D'aar]] and grew up to be a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]. She was a member of a patrol [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] in the [[Bakuran Defense Fleet]].

{{Char-stub}}
